description_long: This object is a display tray containing a collection of canned and bottled food items, prominently featuring Campbell's Tomato Soup cans, Heinz Tomato Ketchup, and cans with blue and white labels. The tray is rectangular and black, with raised sides to keep the items in place. The Campbell's Tomato Soup cans are stacked in two columns on one side, while the Heinz Tomato Ketchup bottle stands upright on the opposite end. The blue and white cans, labeled with Cyrillic script, are arranged in the center, stacked in two layers. The labels are colorful and feature recognizable branding, with red, white, blue, and green as dominant colors. The items are likely made of metal (cans) and plastic (bottle), and the tray appears to be plastic or coated cardboard.
description: A black tray holds several branded food items, including Campbell's Tomato Soup cans, Heinz Tomato Ketchup, and blue-and-white labeled cans. The arrangement is colorful and visually striking, with prominent logos and packaging.
description_view_0: The end view shows the tops of the cans and the ketchup bottle, with the tray's black side panels visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays all product labels clearly, with Campbell's Tomato Soup, Heinz Tomato Ketchup, and blue-and-white cans arranged side by side.
description_view_2: The opposite end view shows the backs of the cans and bottle, with less visible labeling and the tray's black side panel.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the backs of the products, with the Heinz Tomato Ketchup bottle and Campbell's cans visible from behind.
attribute_brand_logo: Campbell's logo in white script on a red background on the soup cans; Heinz logo in green and red on the ketchup bottle; blue and white Cyrillic logo on the central cans.
attribute_flavor_indication: Tomato flavor indicated on Campbell's Tomato Soup cans and Heinz Tomato Ketchup bottle; no explicit flavor on blue-and-white cans.
